query:
INSERT INTO cities (name, countryId, isActive) VALUES
('Karachi', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PK'), 1),
('Lahore', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PK'), 1),
('Islamabad', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PK'), 1),
('Rawalpindi', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PK'), 1),
('Faisalabad', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PK'), 1),
('Multan', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PK'), 1),
('Peshawar', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PK'), 1),
('Quetta', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PK'), 1),
('Sialkot', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PK'), 1),
('Gujranwala', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PK'), 1),
('Hyderabad', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'PK'), 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
